overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character in ancient Egyptian attire ascending a monumental temple staircase at night. The scene features historic stone architecture, torch lighting, colossal statues, and palm trees in a sacred temple complex.

agents.ego_description: walking across the stone plaza toward the grand temple staircase

notable_agents.action: child running across the plaza from right to left

entered.detail: large flat stone tiles forming the temple courtyard floor
multi-level stone structure with columns and warm interior lighting
wide monumental staircase leading up to the temple complex
burning fire basket providing warm orange light against the blue night
tall stone wall with steps leading up to side entrance

segments.scene_description: The character walks across an open stone plaza at night, approaching a grand temple staircase. An ancient building with warm interior glow stands to the left while a child runs across the plaza ahead.

events.description: character begins ascending the wide stone staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the steep stone steps of the temple staircase

entered.detail: smooth stone balustrade along the left side of the stairs
smooth stone balustrade along the right side of the stairs
tall stone wall with decorative carvings alongside the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character begins ascending the grand temple staircase, flanked by stone railings and walls. The plaza falls behind as the climb continues upward into the temple complex.

events.description: massive pharaoh statue comes into view on the right side of the stairs

agents.ego_description: continuing the steep ascent past monumental architecture

entered.detail: massive seated statue of a pharaoh holding a staff, illuminated by torchlight
tall palm trees visible at the top of the staircase against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The ascent continues past a colossal pharaoh statue on the right, with palm trees becoming visible at the summit. The stone railings and stairs dominate the foreground as the character climbs higher.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper temple terrace with statues and scattered debris

events.description: reaches the top of the first stair section and enters the terrace platform

agents.ego_description: walking across the terrace toward the next flight of stairs, passing debris

entered.detail: flat stone terrace with geometric tile patterns and scattered red debris
tall standing statue of a figure with raised arm on a pedestal
red and dark debris scattered across the terrace stones suggesting recent conflict
tall stone obelisk rising against the night sky
second flight of stairs leading to the final temple sanctuary

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto an open terrace with palm trees, a heroic statue, and scattered debris. An obelisk stands in the distance to the right as the character approaches the final staircase to the temple summit.

events.description: begins ascending the final steep staircase to the temple summit

agents.ego_description: climbing the final steep flight of stairs toward the temple gate

entered.detail: massive stone gateway with red glowing elements at the temple summit
statues flanking the top of the stairs guarding the entrance

segments.scene_description: The character begins the final steep ascent toward the temple gate, which glows with red light at the summit. The terrace falls away below as the stairs continue upward between stone walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, moonlit plaza up a monumental staircase toward a glowing temple summit. It begins with the character crossing an open stone plaza past a warmly lit building as a child runs ahead, before the camera shifts focus to the start of a grand ascent. As the character climbs, the plaza falls away and the view expands to reveal a colossal pharaoh statue and distant palm trees flanking the stone railings. The scene then opens onto a wide terrace scattered with debris and featuring a heroic statue and a distant obelisk, before turning toward a final, steep set of stairs. The movement concludes as the character ascends between high stone walls toward a temple gate radiating a deep red light.
